nasb.text: I know, O Lord, that Your judgments are righteous, And that in faithfulness You have afflicted me.

esv.text: I know, O Lord, that your rules are righteous, and that in faithfulness you have afflicted me.

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！我知道你的判語是公義的， 為了你的信實，你使我受苦。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 我知道你的法令公义， 你是凭信实管教我。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，我知道你的法规是公义的； 你磨炼我也是因着你的信实！
